tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes. Chloride, platelet mean volume, and platelet distribution width are slightly elevated but of unclear clinical significance in isolation. All other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and blood counts, are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and clinical correlation for platelet findings if symptoms or risk factors are present.
